summary: Comprehensive backend audit (71 tests) covering all 23 feature areas. Backend is 100% functional. Fixed 3 bugs found during testing: (1) _id serialization in POST /api/pendencias/{id}/contato, (2) 500 error in GET /api/status/pedidos/{id}/proximos due to wrong import name 'TRANSICOES_PERMITIDAS' and wrong fallback 'StatusMatriculaEnum.PENDENTE'. All previously reported _id bugs (apoio_cognitivo, pendencias, contatos, documentos, turmas, chamados_sgc) are confirmed fixed.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - does not exist. Review request mentioned this but actual route is GET /api/alertas/dashboard which aggregates all alerts including overdue pendências
Endpoint returns 404 - does not exist. Use GET /api/alertas/dashboard instead
Endpoint returns 404 - saudação is included in GET /api/apoio/meu-dia response (field 'saudacao'). Not a critical issue.
Endpoint returns 404 - resumo data is inside GET /api/painel-vagas/dashboard (field 'resumo'). Not a critical issue.

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug: _id ObjectId serialization - 'return contato' without 'contato.pop("_id", None)' after insert_one
ImportError: 'TRANSICOES_PERMITIDAS' doesn't exist in status_matricula.py (it's called TRANSICOES_VALIDAS). Also fallback 'StatusMatriculaEnum.PENDENTE' doesn't exist. Both caused 500 error.
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Changed import to TRANSICOES_VALIDAS, changed fallback to StatusMatriculaEnum.INSCRITO

confirmed_fixed_from_prev_iteration: GET /api/chamados-sgc/{id} - nested structure {chamado:{...}, andamentos:[], interacoes:[]} (CONFIRMED FIXED)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add GET /api/alertas/pendencias-vencidas and GET /api/alertas/reembolsos-abertos endpoints if they are needed by frontend (currently frontend should use /api/alertas/dashboard)
OPTIONAL: Add GET /api/apoio/saudacao endpoint if needed separately (currently saudação is in /api/apoio/meu-dia)
OPTIONAL: Add GET /api/painel-vagas/resumo endpoint if needed separately (currently in /api/painel-vagas/dashboard)
CODE QUALITY: Dead code in contatos.py lines 128-136 is unreachable (after return in stats_contatos function) - should be removed

NOTE: GET /api/pedidos/{id}/exportar-totvs does NOT exist as per-pedido export. The TOTVS export is GET /api/pedidos/exportar/totvs (bulk export of all 'realizado' pedidos). Review if per-pedido TOTVS export is needed.
critical_code_review_comments: contatos.py lines 128-136: Dead/unreachable code after 'return' in stats_contatos function. The code block starting with 'total = await db.contatos.count_documents({"pedido_id": pedido_id})' is unreachable.

status_matricula.py: The StatusMatriculaEnum (inscrito, analise_documental, etc.) is a DIFFERENT state machine from the regular pedido status (pendente, em_analise, etc.). Both coexist in the system but modify pedido.status field. This could cause confusion - a pedido set via /api/status/pedidos/{id}/transicionar to 'inscrito' will have its status changed to 'inscrito' which is not in the regular STATUS_LABELS dict. E1 should decide if both state machines should be active simultaneously or if they should be unified.

POST /api/pedidos - AlunoCreateDTO requires many mandatory fields (rg, rg_orgao_emissor, rg_uf, all endereco fields). This is a strict requirement that might block quick pedido creation. Consider making some optional.
POST /api/chamados-sgc - No `doc.pop('_id', None)` after insert but it returns `{'id': doc['id'], ...}` (not the full doc), so it's OK. However future refactors should be careful.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed). All cleanup successful.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19: Backend 100% OK (71/71). All _id ObjectId bugs previously reported are confirmed fixed. Two additional bugs found and fixed: (1) POST /api/pendencias/{id}/contato returned 500 due to missing _id pop (fixed). (2) GET /api/status/pedidos/{id}/proximos returned 500 due to wrong import name TRANSICOES_PERMITIDAS (should be TRANSICOES_VALIDAS) and wrong fallback StatusMatriculaEnum.PENDENTE (should be INSCRITO) (fixed). Frontend testing was not requested in this iteration. Key info: There are two separate status machines: regular pedido status (pendente/em_analise/aprovado/realizado/exportado/cancelado) managed via PATCH /api/pedidos/{id}/status, and an enrollment state machine (inscrito/analise_documental/matriculado/etc) managed via POST /api/status/pedidos/{id}/transicionar.

pendencias_contato_500.root_cause: After insert_one(contato), MongoDB adds _id ObjectId to the contato dict. Returning this dict causes JSON serialization error since ObjectId is not JSON serializable. Missing contato.pop('_id', None) before return.
pendencias_contato_500.fix: Added contato.pop('_id', None) in pendencias.py line 211

status_proximos_500.bug: GET /api/status/pedidos/{id}/proximos returned 500 for any pedido with regular status
status_proximos_500.root_cause: 1) Import error: 'from src.domain.status_matricula import TRANSICOES_PERMITIDAS' - the dict is named TRANSICOES_VALIDAS not TRANSICOES_PERMITIDAS. 2) AttributeError: 'StatusMatriculaEnum.PENDENTE' doesn't exist in enum (values are: inscrito, analise_documental, pendente_pagamento, matriculado, trancado, cancelado, concluido, evadido)
status_proximos_500.fix: Fixed import name and fallback value in status_matricula.py
